The '''Vippits''' were [[Cephalopod/Legends|cephalopods]] from [[Alee]], an [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural world]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].

==Biology==
The Vippits had one large foot with many toes and upon "walking", a yellow mucus trail was often left behind.
A large, flat [[Color/Legends|turquoise]] shell, which displayed deposits and rings, protected the wet and fleshy body, as well as the folds of skin underneath. Their twin eye stalks functioned independently and were capable of reading and absorbing information or other visual stimuli. However, such information could not be integrated until the Vippit slept, thus allowing its mind to pool the mental resources from both sides of its brain.

Vippits used [[viptiel]]s to decorate their shells. At least some of them worshiped the [[Broodmaster]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], the Vippits were at the leverage of the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] and forced to pay tributes. When the Cartel believed that the Vippits were too stingy, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] hired an individual to collect what the Vippits did not want to hand over.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Underworld Trading|Shakedown}}</ref>

Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Vippit [[Lawyer/Legends|lawyers]] were hired by the [[Christophsian/Legends|Christophsians]] to sue anyone who tried to replicate their [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] techniques or strike deals with their trading partners.<ref name="Guide">''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars – The Official Episode Guide: Season 1]]''</ref>

==Known members==
[[Doolb Snoil]] was a notable member of this species, acting as one of the top legal minds of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
